decoder.name: arcenum-sentinel-alert
decoder.regex: ArcenumSentinel: ALERT level=(\S+) src=(\S+) user=(\S+) action=(\S+) detail="(\.+)"

decoder.name: arcenum-sentinel-auth
decoder.regex: ArcenumSentinel: AUTH status=(\S+) user=(\S+) src=(\S+) method=(\S+)

decoder.name: arcenum-sentinel-endpoint
decoder.regex: ArcenumSentinel: ENDPOINT host=(\S+) pid=(\d+) process=(\S+) cmdline="(\.+)" user=(\S+)

decoder.name: arcenum-wolfsense-detection
decoder.regex: WolfsenseEDR: DETECT technique=(\S+) host=(\S+) pid=(\d+) process=(\S+) severity=(\S+)
